title: apium alpinum
intro: Apium alpinum, also known as Alpine Celery, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apium alpinum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from various respiratory problems. Apium alpinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
